---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea for a new game mode, biome/theme, obstacle type, physics parameter, or UI enhancement."
title: "[FEATURE] <Short title for the enhancement>"
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""

---

## 🎯 Objective
Is your feature request related to a specific problem or just a general improvement? Please describe the motivation behind this request (e.g., wanting new bird skins, biome visual effects, custom control schemes, or background music options).

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of the feature or functionality you would like to see implemented in Flying Bird.

## 📐 Design & UI
If this is a UI enhancement, how does it fit into the Dark Terminal / Cyberpunk style of Flying Bird? Describe any visual changes or additions (e.g., custom buttons, overlays, particle systems, or screen transitions).

## 🎮 Game Engine & Scoring Logic
If this requires changes to the gameplay loops or physics engine:
- Necessary gameplay changes (e.g., gravity strength, bird jump velocity, collision box margins)
- Expected state values (e.g., score tracking, speed thresholds, settings database persistence)
- Persistent preference updates

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered to solve the same problem.

---
*Your feedback drives Flying Bird's evolution. Thank you for contributing!*
